emails.subject: AReM Media Alert
emails.body: I helped make this more agressive. The first draft I saw just said take note that the CPUC is considering doing this. We know that Kate Berry of OCo Register is doing a story. She called Jeff on it. Sue Mara Enron Corp. Tel: (415) 782-7802 Fax:(415) 782-7854 Forwarded by Susan J Mara/NA/Enron on 06/07/2001 11:06 AM "Manuel, Erica" <Erica.Manuel@edelman.com> 06/07/2001 11:00 AM
